chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4201 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For order on Misc. No. 10837/2023 2. For haring of Misc. No. 17969/2022 3. For hearing of main case 04-03-2025 Mr. Mushtaq Hussain Qazi, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo Advocate for the Respondent No.2 and 3 Mr. Muhammad Farhan, Advocate for the Respondent No.4 Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel the Petitioner seeks a writ of quo-warranto against the Respondent No.4. Prima facie the Respondent No.4 is not a person holding or purporting to hold a public office and hence, no case is made out to entertain a plea seeking writ of quo-warranto. Petition is found to be misconceived and dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge Amjad PS
